top_signals.title: Bank of Japan Needs Strong Measures to Prop Up Yen: Strategists
top_signals.summary: Strategists expect the yen and government bonds to remain under pressure while Japan’s stocks continue to find support following the Bank of Japan’s decision to raise rates on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bank of Japan Raises Benchmark Interest Rate to 1%
top_signals.summary: Japan's central bank increased its benchmark interest rate to the highest since 1995 and signaled that further policy normalization lies ahead. Bloomberg's Shery Ahn reports from Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: General Atomics awarded US Army contract for extended-range artillery round
top_signals.summary: During a test last year, the company's projectile hit targets more than 74 miles away after being fired from an M777 howitzer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI spending hit $34bn last year ahead of planned IPO
top_signals.summary: Audited figures reveal mounting costs from model development, infrastructure and rapid expansion
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Barr, Deregulating in a Financial Boom: What Could Go Wrong?
top_signals.summary: Speech At American University, Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt, Germany

top_signals.title: Montage Gold boosts Koné resources by 58%
top_signals.summary: The update gives Koné 244 million measured and indicated tonnes grading 0.8 gram gold per tonne for 6.2 million oz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ucore, Sumitomo team up on rare earth supply chain development
top_signals.summary: The companies will collaborate on sourcing rare earth feedstock for Ucore’s Louisiana strategic metals complex.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
